page.name: 📄 Page
page.description: The central point of our CMS. It defines the individual pages that appear on our website, the languages they target, where the page sits in the content hierarchy, and how the page should be seen by search engines and social websites.

embedBlock.name: 🗃️ Embed Block
embedBlock.description: Used to embed external content from select sources outside of bp into the site

environmentSettings.name: ⚙️ Environment Settings
environmentSettings.description: Allows us to set options and collect information important to an entire Contentful environment

cardCollection.name: 📇 Card Collection
cardCollection.description: Display a group of cards, with a number of formatting and layout options.

hero.name: 🎆 Hero
hero.description: Usually displayed at the top of a page, the hero allows us to display important or featured content to the user in a large format, either as a single item, or as a carousel with multiple slides.

quote.name: 📣 Quote
quote.description: Quotes that can be used within various cards and rich text blocks.

downloadsBlock.name: 🧱 Downloads Block
downloadsBlock.description: The downloads component provides quick access to downloadable resources, such as reports, documents, or other files. It organizes these into a structured list with each item displaying key information, including the document title, publication date, file type, and size, as well as the ability to download.

modal.name: 📄 Modal
modal.description: A modal is a UI overlay that displays content on top of the main interface, typically used to capture user attention for tasks like confirmations, forms, alerts, or additional details. It disables interaction with the underlying content until dismissed, ensuring focus on the modal’s content.

cta.name: 🔗 CTA
cta.description: Generic, reusable, configurable Call To Action (CTA) that can be dropped into other content blocks

card.name: 🪪 Card
card.description: Used to display, and link to, a variety of content across the site. By default, it pulls its content from the target page being linked to, but this content can be overridden to create a custom card linking to the same content.

kalturaBackgroundVideo.name: ▶️ Kaltura Background Video
kalturaBackgroundVideo.description: Kaltura video fields where the video will be used as a background.

kalturaVideoBlock.name: ▶️ Kaltura Video Block
kalturaVideoBlock.description: Allows the author to embed video player into the page

richTextBlock.name: 📝 Rich text block
richTextBlock.description: Generic rich text component to allow us to add content to pages without the need for additional semantic context or special layout.

downloadableAsset.name: 📎 Downloadable Asset
downloadableAsset.description: An asset that can be downloaded and found in search results

rmaSpaceReference.name: 🧱 RMA Space Reference
rmaSpaceReference.description: A utility content type to enable RMA authors to make additive or substitutional changes to global content whilst RMA content is under preparation

splitLayoutBlock.name: 🧩 Split Layout Block
splitLayoutBlock.description: A split component is a component that would be used as a flexible layout block that would allow authors to insert components into two columns and choose how to align content left or right.

ignoreFocalPointWithinRichText.name: Ignore focal point within Rich text

switchingContentSection.name: 📝 Switching Content Section
switchingContentSection.description: Create sections for use within a Switching Content Block, that can be shown and hidden, generally by clicking on their section title.

filteredListBlock.name: 🧱 Filtered List Block
filteredListBlock.description: Present a collection of reference-able content in contentful to the user.

marketAndLanguage.name: 🌐 Market and Language
marketAndLanguage.description: Allows us to define a set of locale strings that constitute a market that a page, or navigation elements, can be targeted to.

heroSlide.name: 📝 Hero Slide
heroSlide.description: Individual unit of content for the Hero content type. Can be used singularly or together to form a carousel.

newsletterSignupBlock.name: 🧱 Newsletter Signup Block
newsletterSignupBlock.description: The Newsletter signup component is an in-page banner designed to encourage users to subscribe to our newsletter. Positioned within content pages, it provides a clear call-to-action and a simple form input. This component helps increase newsletter registrations.

header.name: 🏗️ Header
header.description: Contains configuration for a header to be used on the website, targeted to a particular locale or locales. This configuration includes navigation and logo overrides.

externalResource.name: 🔗 External Resource
externalResource.description: For use in filtered lists, e.g. the advocacy hub – this allows an author to link to an external URL and provide additional contextual information.

footer.name: 🏗️ Footer
footer.description: Contains configuration for a footer to be used on the website, targeted to a particular locale or locales. This configuration includes navigation and copyright overrides.

notificationBanner.name: ℹ Notification Banner
notificationBanner.description: The Notification Banner is a flexible, visually prominent UI component designed to deliver important messages to users at the top of a page or section.

textLinkGroup.name: 📝 Text Link Group
textLinkGroup.description: Used to create sets of links with an accompanying title for use in a variety of places across the site.

mediaAsset.name: 🖼️ Media Asset
mediaAsset.description: Create an asset to be used within other elements such as cards, with options for adding a separate mobile image, adding looping video and setting default values for alt text and descriptions.

footnote.name: 📄 Footnote
footnote.description: Footnotes can be added to Rich Text Blocks to provide additional contextual information

authorGuide.name: ℹ️ Author Guide
authorGuide.description: A utility content type that exists only to provide author guidance on how to do something in Contentful

tout.name: 🎑 Image Stack
tout.description: A two-column block, comprising of a media item on one side and text and CTAs on the other, which stacks on mobile

switchingContentCollection.name: 🔄 Switching Content Collection
switchingContentCollection.description: Create a set of switchable content that can be shown/hidden via tabs, accordions etc

bentoGridBlock.name: 📇 Bento Grid Block
bentoGridBlock.description: Display a collection of cards in a Bento layout format, e.g. for the Investor Hub

navigationLink.name: 🔗 Navigation Link
navigationLink.description: Link to either an internal page or modal, or an external URL.

anchorLinkBlock.name: 🔗 Anchor Link Block
anchorLinkBlock.description: Provides a way for key communication content to be sectioned up and presented in a more digestible way for the user.

linksGalleryBlock.name: 🎑 Links Gallery Block
linksGalleryBlock.description: A bespoke component for showing a set of three links, each with a media item associated with them, which is revealed on hovering over the link

fullWidthMediaBlock.name: 🎑 Full-width Media Block
fullWidthMediaBlock.description: A large media block, broken out of the flow and width of the page content, including a content block to display text and CTA(s)

linksGalleryItem.name: 📝 Links Gallery Item
linksGalleryItem.description: An item held within a Links Gallery Block

embeddedExperienceBlock.name: 🧭 Embedded Experience Block
embeddedExperienceBlock.description: Insert available Embedded Experiences (formerly NavApps) into pages

microcopyItem.name: 📖 Microcopy Item
microcopyItem.description: Contains standardised translations for various pieces of microcopy to be used around the site. This is a separate, orphaned content model, not linked to from other content types, but pulled directly into the web app to be used there

embeddedExperience.name: ⚙️ Embedded Experience
embeddedExperience.description: Allows AM team to configure available Embedded Experiences (formerly NavApps) that authors can insert into pages. Authors do not have the ability to create content of this type themselves.
